'''Zytho''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] farmer who lived on [[Dorlo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], he was driven off his property when [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] discovered a huge ore load under his [[Braal]] fields. He was soon killed by the Empire.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1stm}}
